title: Senior Teacher - Allen Career Institute - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Allen Career Institute - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Allen Career Institute. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!
